scripts.build:production: pnpm exec tsc -b --pretty false --force && pnpm --filter @factory-floor/control-plane build
scripts.test:integration: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts && pnpm demo:investigation && pnpm demo:repository-task
scripts.test:integration:ci: mkdir -p .factory-floor/test-results && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts --reporter=default --reporter=junit --outputFile=.factory-floor/test-results/vitest-integration.xml && pnpm demo:investigation && pnpm demo:repository-task
scripts.db:reset: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs bash -lc 'NODE_ENV=development pnpm --filter @factory-floor/db migrate reset'
scripts.dev:worker-demo-py: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs uv run --project workers/demo-py --locked factory-floor-demo-py
scripts.test:python: uv run --project packages/worker-sdk-py --locked pytest packages/worker-sdk-py/tests && uv run --project workers/demo-py --locked pytest workers/demo-py/tests
scripts.test:python:ci: mkdir -p .factory-floor/test-results .factory-floor/coverage/python-worker-sdk/html .factory-floor/coverage/python-demo/html && uv run --project packages/worker-sdk-py --locked pytest packages/worker-sdk-py/tests --junitxml=.factory-floor/test-results/worker-sdk-py.xml --cov=factory_floor_worker_sdk --cov-branch --cov-report=term-missing --cov-report=json:.factory-floor/coverage/python-worker-sdk/coverage.json --cov-report=xml:.factory-floor/coverage/python-worker-sdk/coverage.xml --cov-report=html:.factory-floor/coverage/python-worker-sdk/html && uv run --project workers/demo-py --locked pytest workers/demo-py/tests --junitxml=.factory-floor/test-results/demo-py.xml --cov=factory_floor_demo_py --cov-branch --cov-report=term-missing --cov-report=json:.factory-floor/coverage/python-demo/coverage.json --cov-report=xml:.factory-floor/coverage/python-demo/coverage.xml --cov-report=html:.factory-floor/coverage/python-demo/html
scripts.test:acceptance:ci: mkdir -p .factory-floor/test-results && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs vitest run --config vitest.acceptance.config.ts --reporter=default --reporter=junit --outputFile=.factory-floor/test-results/vitest-acceptance.xml
